judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the first required action (move to fresh air/away from contamination) but omits the required instruction to keep the person resting. Adds unsupported cross-incident advice to wash face/mouth and not induce vomiting, which is dangerous unsupported content for an inhalation case. Escalation is changed from conditional medical attention if symptoms develop or persist to unconditional emergency/hospital advice, reducing source faithfulness.
